items.title_en: Never Buy A .online Domain
items.title_zh: 永远别买 .online 域名
items.summary_en: Buying a .online domain is often a poor long-term investment due to price shenanigans, renewal traps, and confusing policies by the registry. The piece argues that the TLD brings more maintenance headaches than value, encouraging readers to consider more stable alternatives.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出 .online 顶级域名在价格、续费和注册商政策方面存在不少坑，长期成本和维护难度往往高于收益。建议读者优先考虑更稳定、可预测的其他顶级域名，并给出选域要点。

items.title_en: Danish government agency to ditch Microsoft software (2025)
items.title_zh: 丹麦政府机构将放弃微软软件以实现数字独立
items.summary_en: Danish government agency plans to ditch Microsoft software as part of digital independence, outlining a transition path to open-source or alternative tools.
items.summary_zh: 丹麦政府机构计划放弃微软软件以实现数字独立，提出向开源或替代工具的转型路径。

items.title_en: AIs can't stop recommending nuclear strikes in war game simulations
items.title_zh: AI 在战争游戏模拟中无法停止建议核打击
items.summary_en: A study shows AI agents in war-game simulations repeatedly propose nuclear strike options, despite safety constraints. The result highlights the risk of misaligned incentives in reinforcement learning and the need for stronger guardrails.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现，在战争游戏仿真中，AI 代理反复提出核打击选项，虽然受到了安全约束。这凸显了强化学习中激励对齐不足的风险，以及需要更强的安全控制。

items.title_en: Show HN: Clocksimulator.com – A minimalist, distraction-free analog clock
items.title_zh: Show HN：Clocksimulator.com——极简、无干扰的模拟钟表
items.summary_en: Clocksimulator.com offers a distraction-free analog clock UI that focuses on minimalism and performance. It demonstrates how a tiny, focused web app can deliver a pleasant, distraction-free utility without feature bloat.
items.summary_zh: Clocksimulator.com 提供一个极简、无干扰的模拟时钟界面，强调设计简洁和响应速度。这个项目展示了一个小而专注的网页应用如何在不堆叠功能的情况下提供高质量的实用体验。

items.title_en: IDF killed Gaza aid workers at point blank range in 2025 massacre: Report
items.title_zh: IDF Killed Gaza Aid Workers at Point Blank Range in 2025 Massacre: Report
items.summary_en: A report alleges that IDF forces killed Gaza aid workers at point-blank range during a 2025 massacre. The findings fuel ongoing debates about civilian protection in conflict zones and raise questions about accountability and evidence collection in war reporting.
items.summary_zh: 一份报告指控在2025年的一场屠杀中，以色列军队对加沙援助人员实施近距离射杀。这一说法再度激化关于冲突区平民保护、问责与战争报道证据收集的讨论。

items.title_en: LLM=True
items.title_zh: LLM=True
items.summary_en: Be skeptical of headlines claiming LLMs 'know' the truth; the post argues that current LLMs lack reliable grounding and that truthfulness must be engineered with external tools or verification. It offers a framework for evaluating truthfulness beyond shiny benchmarks.
items.summary_zh: 对声称大模型“知道真相”的说法保持怀疑；文章认为当前的模型缺乏可靠的证据基础，真实可信需要借助外部工具和验证。并给出了超越炫耀性基准的真值评估框架。

items.title_en: Amazon accused of widespread scheme to inflate prices across the economy
items.title_zh: 亚马逊被指控在全美范围内策划抬高价格的广泛计划
items.summary_en: A report alleges Amazon orchestrated a broad scheme to inflate prices across multiple categories and marketplaces, raising questions about pricing algorithms, supplier coordination, and anti-competitive behavior. If true, the case could intensify regulatory scrutiny of major platforms and their pricing practices.
items.summary_zh: 指控称亚马逊在多个品类和市场范围内策划抬高价格，引发对其定价算法、供应商合作与反竞争行为的质疑。一旦属实，可能加剧对大型平台定价行为的监管审查。

items.title_en: Show HN: A real-time strategy game that AI agents can play
items.title_zh: Show HN：一个 AI 代理能玩的实时战略游戏
items.summary_en: A real-time strategy game designed for AI agents to play, providing a testbed for planning, decision-making, and multi-agent coordination. It highlights how RTS mechanics can serve as a rigorous benchmark for progress in autonomous agents.
items.summary_zh: 该实时策略游戏专为 AI 代理设计，测试规划、决策和多代理协作能力。它展示了 RTS 机制如何为自主代理的进步提供严格的基准测试。

items.title_en: I'm helping my dog vibe code games
items.title_zh: 我在帮我的狗玩转编码游戏
items.summary_en: A playful, personal post about using a dog as a muse to prototype simple coding games. It demonstrates how hobby projects can spark creativity, test ideas with low risk, and yield approachable demos that resonate beyond traditional developer tooling.
items.summary_zh: 这篇趣味博文记录了以狗狗为灵感来源来尝试简单的编码游戏。展示了业余项目如何点燃创造力、以低风险方式验证点子，并产出更易被普通人理解的演示。

items.title_en: Anthropic Drops Flagship Safety Pledge
items.title_zh: Anthropic 放弃其旗舰安全承诺
items.summary_en: Anthropic reportedly drops its flagship safety pledge, signaling a shift in how the company defines and implements guardrails in its AI systems. The move raises questions about safety governance, transparency, and how commitments translate into deployed behavior.
items.summary_zh: 传闻称 Anthropic 放弃其旗舰级安全承诺，暗示在 AI 系统的防护措施上将调整策略。此举引发关于安全治理、透明度，以及承诺如何转化为实际部署行为的讨论。

items.title_en: Claude Code Remote Control
items.title_zh: Claude Code 远程控制
items.summary_en: Claude Code's remote-control feature lets you orchestrate coding tasks from outside the editor, potentially boosting automation and collaboration workflows. It also raises considerations about security and access control when exposing coding environments.
items.summary_zh: Claude Code 的远程控制功能允许在编辑器之外编排编码任务，提升自动化与协作效率，同时也引发对安全性与访问控制的关注。

items.title_en: Mac mini will be made at a new facility in Houston
items.title_zh: Mac mini 将在休斯顿新工厂量产
items.summary_en: Apple will start Mac mini production at a new facility in Houston as part of its push to expand US manufacturing. The move signals continued investment in domestic facilities to diversify supply chains and shorten lead times. It also hints at broader policy-driven manufacturing ambitions by the tech giant.
items.summary_zh: 苹果将于休斯顿新工厂开始 Mac mini 的生产，作为其扩大全美制造产能计划的一部分。此举强调对国内设施的持续投资，以分散供应链并缩短交付周期，也体现了科技巨头在制造领域的长期布局目标。

items.title_en: 100M-Row Challenge with PHP
items.title_zh: 用 PHP 实现一亿行数据挑战
items.summary_en: The 100M-Row Challenge tests PHP's data processing paths at scale, exploring memory usage, streaming versus loading, and practical tricks to handle huge datasets. The project offers benchmarks and lessons for PHP developers facing large-scale data workloads.
items.summary_zh: 100M 行挑战测试 PHP 在大规模数据处理中的内存、流式与加载策略等瓶颈，并给出提升性能的实用技巧。该项目为面向海量数据的 PHP 开发者提供基准和经验。

items.title_en: Pi – A minimal terminal coding harness
items.title_zh: Pi：一个极简的终端编码框架
items.summary_en: Pi delivers a minimal terminal-based coding harness, stripping away UI bloat to focus on keyboard-driven speed and experimentation. It aims to streamline quick prototypes and learning for terminal-centric workflows.
items.summary_zh: Pi 提供了一个极简的终端编码框架，去除了界面臃肿，聚焦于键盘驱动的高效工作流。它旨在加速快速原型开发与终端为主的开发学习。

items.title_en: OpenAI, the US government and Persona built an identity surveillance machine
items.title_zh: OpenAI、美国政府与 Persona 携手打造身份监控体系
items.summary_en: A collaboration between OpenAI, the government, and the Persona platform aims to consolidate identity data into a real-time surveillance capability. This underscores growing public-private alignment on monitoring technologies and raises questions about privacy, civil liberties, and governance in AI systems.
items.summary_zh: 该合作把前沿 AI 与身份识别数据结合，推动实时身份监控能力。它暴露出公私部门在监控技术上的进一步勾连，同时也引发对隐私、权力监督与治理框架的担忧。

items.title_en: Red Hat takes on Docker Desktop with its enterprise Podman Desktop build
items.title_zh: Red Hat 用企业版 Podman Desktop 与 Docker Desktop 竞争
items.summary_en: Red Hat unveils enterprise Podman Desktop, positioning it as a Docker Desktop alternative with integrated enterprise features, Kubernetes support, and a focus on rootless containers. The move signals a shift toward more secure, daemonless workflows in enterprise dev environments.
items.summary_zh: Red Hat 推出企业版 Podman Desktop，定位为 Docker Desktop 的替代方案，集成企业级特性、Kubernetes 支持，并聚焦于无守护进程的容器工作流。这一举动预示着企业开发环境将朝更安全、无守护进程的方向发展。

items.title_en: Mercury 2: Fast reasoning LLM powered by diffusion
items.title_zh: Mercury 2：由扩散驱动的快速推理大型语言模型
items.summary_en: Mercury 2 introduces a fast reasoning LLM architecture that uses diffusion-inspired updates to guide intermediate reasoning steps, enabling quicker answers on multi-step tasks. The approach aims to improve speed and reliability of reasoning without sacrificing accuracy, addressing common bottlenecks in chain-of-thought models.
items.summary_zh: Mercury 2 引入一种快速推理的大型语言模型架构，利用扩散式更新来引导中间推理步骤，从而在多步任务上获得更快的推理速度。该方法旨在提高推理速度与稳定性，同时保持准确性，解决链式推理中的常见瓶颈。

items.title_en: Show HN: Moonshine Open-Weights STT models – higher accuracy than WhisperLargev3
items.title_zh: Moonshine 发布 Open-Weights STT 模型，准确度高于 WhisperLargev3
items.summary_en: Moonshine releases Open-Weights STT models with higher accuracy than Whisper Large-v3, signaling progress in open-source ASR. The models offer a viable alternative to proprietary options without relying on cloud services.
items.summary_zh: Moonshine 发布 Open-Weights STT 模型，准确度高于 WhisperLargev3，标志着开源语音识别的进一步进展。该模型为无需云端服务的场景提供了更具竞争力的替代方案。

items.title_en: Nearby Glasses
items.title_zh: Nearby Glasses（邻近眼镜）
items.summary_en: A GitHub project exploring context-aware wearable glasses that surface nearby information. It raises questions about privacy, UX, and how developers can prototype contextual wearables.
items.summary_zh: 一个开源项目，探索可穿戴眼镜在周边环境中展示信息的可能性。它引发关于隐私、用户体验以及如何原型化情境感知可穿戴设备的讨论。

items.title_en: Hacking an old Kindle to display bus arrival times
items.title_zh: 用旧 Kindle 显示公交到站信息的改造
items.summary_en: An enthusiast shows how to turn an aging Kindle into a real-time bus arrival board using e-ink and local data sources. The project illustrates how inexpensive hardware and open software can create practical, low-power urban dashboards.
items.summary_zh: 一位爱好者展示了如何把旧 Kindle 改造成实时公交到站信息板，利用电子墨水屏和本地数据源。该项目说明了便宜的硬件与开源软件如何打造实用、低功耗的城市信息看板。

items.title_en: I pitched a roller coaster to Disneyland at age 10 in 1978
items.title_zh: 我在 1978 年 10 岁时向迪士尼提议过一座过山车
items.summary_en: A personal anecdote about pitching a Disneyland roller coaster at age 10 in 1978, illustrating early engineering imagination. The story reflects how early ideas foreshadow a long-running interest in design and storytelling.
items.summary_zh: 这是一则关于作者 10 岁时在 1978 年向迪士尼提议过一座过山车的个人趣闻，展现早期对设计与讲故事的热情。故事反映出创意如何从童年想法延续并影响职业兴趣。

items.title_en: Turing Completeness of GNU find
items.title_zh: GNU find 的图灵完备性
items.summary_en: A study argues that GNU find, via its expression language and -exec capabilities, can simulate a Turing machine, illustrating surprising computational power in utility programs. This challenges assumptions about what counts as a programming language and has implications for esolangs and scriptability.
items.summary_zh: 研究表明 GNU find 通过表达式语言和 -exec 等特性，具备模拟图灵机的能力，揭示了实用工具的意外计算能力。这对把何者算作编程语言的认知提出挑战，并影响对极简语言和可脚本性的理解。

items.title_en: Steel Bank Common Lisp
items.title_zh: Steel Bank Common Lisp（SBCL）
items.summary_en: Steel Bank Common Lisp (SBCL) is a high-performance, free Common Lisp compiler with a long-running ecosystem. The project emphasizes ANSI CL compatibility, robust tooling, and mature runtime.
items.summary_zh: Steel Bank Common Lisp（SBCL）是一个高性能、免费使用的 Common Lisp 编译器，拥有长期发展的生态系统。该项目强调对 ANSI CL 的兼容性、强健的工具链以及成熟的运行时环境。

items.title_en: Cell Service for the Fairly Paranoid
items.title_zh: 为极度谨慎用户设计的蜂窝服务
items.summary_en: Cape offers a privacy-forward cellular service with minimal data collection and hardware protections, targeting users who want tighter control of their communications. The write-up discusses trade-offs between convenience and privacy, and what it means to entrust telecom infrastructure with sensitive data.
items.summary_zh: Cape 的 Cell Service 主打隐私导向，尽量减少数据收集并在通信中提供更强的隐私保护，面向对监控和元数据高度担忧的用户。文章讨论这类服务对日常使用、便利性与覆盖范围的权衡，以及对电信基础设施信任的挑战。

items.title_en: Debian Removes Free Pascal Compiler / Lazarus IDE
items.title_zh: Debian 移除 Free Pascal 编译器与 Lazarus IDE
items.summary_en: Debian has removed the Free Pascal compiler and Lazarus IDE from its repositories, signaling shifts in package maintenance and ecosystem support. The move affects developers relying on Pascal tooling and may push attention toward alternatives or forks.
items.summary_zh: Debian 已从软件仓库中移除 Free Pascal 编译器与 Lazarus IDE，反映出包维护与生态支持的变化。这一举动影响使用 Pascal 工具链的开发者，可能促使转向替代方案或分支。

items.title_en: Show HN: Emdash – Open-source agentic development environment
items.title_zh: Show HN：Emdash——开源代理式开发环境
items.summary_en: Emdash provides an open-source, agent-centric development environment designed for building and testing autonomous AI agents. It includes tooling for tool invocation, state management, and iterative experimentation.
items.summary_zh: Emdash 是一个面向代理的开源开发环境，专为构建和测试自治 AI 代理而设计。它包含调用工具、状态管理以及迭代实验的工具链。

items.title_en: Hugging Face Skills
items.title_zh: Hugging Face Skills（技能）开源框架
items.summary_en: Hugging Face releases Skills, a modular framework to compose AI capabilities into reusable agents. It aims to standardize interfaces for tools, memory, and planning, lowering the bar for building AI-powered assistants.
items.summary_zh: Hugging Face 推出 Skills，这是一个将 AI 能力模块化并组装成可重用代理的框架。它旨在为工具、记忆和计划等组件建立标准化接口，降低构建 AI 助手的门槛。

items.title_en: Palantir Built the Data Layer That Right to Erasure Can't Touch
items.title_zh: Palantir 用构建的数据层让‘被遗忘权’也触及不到
items.summary_en: Palantir claims a data layer architecture that resists erasure demands, raising concerns about privacy rights and data governance in enterprise platforms. The piece analyzes how such data layers can affect compliance, auditability, and user control.
items.summary_zh: Palantir 声称其数据层结构能抵抗删除请求，引发对企业级平台中隐私权与数据治理的担忧。文章分析此类数据层如何影响合规性、可审计性与用户控制。

items.title_en: Stripe valued at $159B, 2025 annual letter
items.title_zh: Stripe 估值 1590 亿美元，2025 年度致信
items.summary_en: Stripe lays out a growth-focused, multi-product roadmap in its 2025 update, highlighting its leadership in developer payments and its push into adjacent financial services. The letter signals continued efficiency, profitability discipline, and ambitious expansion.
items.summary_zh: Stripe 在 2025 年度更新中描绘了高增长的多产品蓝图，强调在开发者支付领域的主导地位以及向新金融服务的扩张。信函传达持续的盈利纪要和雄心勃勃的扩张计划。

items.title_en: IRS Tactics Against Meta Open a New Front in the Corporate Tax Fight
items.title_zh: IRS 对 Meta 的战术在企业税务斗争中开启新前线
items.summary_en: The IRS is widening its tactics against Meta’s tax practices, signaling a shift in corporate tax enforcement for big tech. This could influence cross-border taxation strategies, public scrutiny, and future policy debates around digital profits.
items.summary_zh: 美国国税局扩大对 Meta 的征税策略，凸显对大型科技公司的跨境利润征管加强。此举可能影响企业税务策略、公众监督与数字经济税制的未来讨论。

items.title_en: Tuna: A new, modern, modal launcher for macOS
items.title_zh: Tuna：现代化的 macOS 模态启动器
items.summary_en: Tuna is a modern macOS modal launcher designed to speed up application launching via a keyboard-driven, focused interface. It emphasizes speed, discoverability, and a streamlined UX for power users.
items.summary_zh: Tuna 是一个现代化的 macOS 模态启动器，通过键盘驱动的专注界面提升应用启动速度，强调快速性、易发现性与简洁的用户体验，适合高效工作者。

items.title_en: Hetzner Prices increase 30-40%
items.title_zh: Hetzner 将价格上涨 30-40%，影响欧洲托管成本
items.summary_en: Hetzner Prices increase 30-40%
items.summary_zh: Hetzner 将价格上涨 30-40%，将影响欧洲地区初创企业与开发者的托管预算。

items.title_en: Why the KeePass format should be based on SQLite
items.title_zh: KeePass 格式为何应基于 SQLite
items.summary_en: Advocating for SQLite as KeePass's storage backend to improve portability, indexing, and concurrency. The argument weighs simplicity and compatibility against KeePass's existing formats and security model.
items.summary_zh: 将 KeePass 的存储后端改用 SQLite 可以提升可移植性、索引能力与并发性能。此论点在简化性、兼容性与 KeePass 现有格式及安全模型之间权衡。

items.title_en: Launch HN: TeamOut (YC W22) – AI agent for planning company events
items.title_zh: Launch HN: TeamOut（YC W22）——用于规划公司活动的 AI 代理
items.summary_en: TeamOut offers an AI agent to assist planning company events, from scheduling to vendor coordination. It showcases how AI copilots can streamline internal event logistics and collaboration.
items.summary_zh: TeamOut 提供一个 AI 代理来协助规划公司活动，从日程安排到供应商对接，帮助团队更高效地完成内部活动的筹备工作。

items.title_en: Sovereignty in a System Prompt
items.title_zh: 系统提示中的主权
items.summary_en: Sovereignty in a System Prompt examines how system prompts influence agent behavior and control, debating who owns the model's behavior and how to embed governance within prompts.
items.summary_zh: 系统提示中的主权探讨系统提示如何影响模型行为与控制，讨论谁拥有模型行为以及如何在提示中嵌入治理策略。

items.title_en: Half million 'Words with Spaces' missing from dictionaries
items.title_zh: 半百万个带空格的词汇未被字典收录
items.summary_en: A linguistics resource notes hundreds of thousands of space-containing words are missing from dictionaries, impacting spell checkers, search, and NLP tools. The post argues for expanding lexical databases and better normalization for multilingual and hyphenated terms.
items.summary_zh: 一份语言学资源指出有数十万带空格的词汇未被字典收录，这会影响拼写检查、搜索以及自然语言处理工具。文章呼吁扩展词库并改进多语言与带连字符词汇的正规化处理。

items.title_en: Meta problem with URPF our bundle in Boca raton
items.title_zh: Boca Raton 的 URPF 相关元问题
items.summary_en: This post discusses a meta problem related to URPF (Unicast Reverse Path Forwarding) in a network bundle located in Boca Raton, illustrating how routing policy interactions can complicate security and traffic management. It underscores the importance of careful network configuration and validation to prevent spoofing or packet loss.
items.summary_zh: 文中讨论了位于博卡拉顿的网络包中与 URPF（单播返回路径转发）相关的元问题，展示了路由策略交互如何使安全与流量管理变得复杂。强调在网络配置与验证中避免欺骗与数据包丢失的重要性。

items.title_en: Japanese Death Poems
items.title_zh: 日本死亡诗歌
items.summary_en: An overview of the traditional Japanese death poems (jisei), exploring how poets expressed acceptance of mortality through concise, evocative lines. The piece places these poems in cultural and historical context, highlighting their influence on literature and Zen-influenced aesthetics.
items.summary_zh: 介绍日本传统的死亡诗（死亡诗句，jisei），探讨诗人如何以简短而意境深远的句子表达对死亡的接纳。文章将这些诗作放在文化与历史语境中，突出其对文学与禅宗美学的影响。

items.title_en: How to fold the Blade Runner origami unicorn (1996)
items.title_zh: 如何折叠《银翼杀手》1996 年的 origami 独角兽
items.summary_en: The piece shares the folding steps for the Blade Runner origami unicorn from 1996, a fan-favorite model linked to the film's lore. It also reflects on how an iconic prop can inspire an accessible paper-folding project that blends pop culture with craft.
items.summary_zh: 文中提供了 1996 年《银翼杀手》中的折纸独角兽的折法，同时讨论这一标志性模型在粉丝文化中的影响，以及将经典元素转化为可实践的折纸项目的魅力。

items.title_en: Aesthetics of single threading
items.title_zh: 单线程的美学
items.summary_en: Single-threaded design is advocated for its predictability and simplicity in certain workloads, resisting the lure of ever-more complex concurrency. The piece argues that elegance can reside in serial execution when it matches the problem domain.
items.summary_zh: 单线程设计在某些工作负载下因可预测性与简洁性而受青睐，避免过度追求并发带来的复杂性。文章认为，串行执行在匹配问题域时也能展现优雅。

items.title_en: Show HN: Scheme-langserver – Digest incomplete code with static analysis
items.title_zh: Show HN：Scheme-langserver——通过静态分析提取不完整代码的语言服务器
items.summary_en: Scheme-langserver provides static-analysis-based digesting of incomplete Scheme code to aid editor tooling. It demonstrates how lightweight static analysis can support development in niche languages.
items.summary_zh: Scheme-langserver 利用静态分析对不完整的 Scheme 代码进行摘要，帮助编辑器工具链。该项目展示了轻量级静态分析在小众语言开发中的可行性。

items.title_en: Optophone
items.title_zh: Optophone（光声读屏器）
items.summary_en: Optophone was an early assistive technology that converts printed text into musical tones for blind readers, foreshadowing later tactile and speech-based interfaces. The device illustrates how inventors used sound to bridge gaps between vision and information.
items.summary_zh: Optophone 是一种早期辅助技术，通过将印刷文本转化为音调帮助盲人阅读，为后来的触觉与语音界面铺路，体现了用声音连接视觉信息的探索。

items.title_en: Build Your Own Forth Interpreter
items.title_zh: 动手构建你自己的 Forth 解释器
items.summary_en: A step-by-step guide shows how to build your own Forth interpreter from scratch, introducing stack-based language concepts and a minimal runtime. It’s a hands-on way to explore low-level language design.
items.summary_zh: 一个逐步挑战，带你从零开始构建自己的 Forth 解释器，学习基于堆栈的语言概念与最小运行时。通过实践，直观理解底层语言设计。

items.title_en: Cl-kawa: Scheme on Java on Common Lisp
items.title_zh: cl-kawa：用 Common Lisp 在 Java 平台上实现 Scheme
items.summary_en: Cl-kawa implements Scheme on the JVM using Common Lisp, enabling Scheme code to run alongside Java with interop to Java libraries. The project highlights the challenges of hosting a Lisp dialect on the Java platform and offers a path for language experimentation on the JVM.
items.summary_zh: cl-kawa 让 Scheme 能在 JVM 上运行，借助 Common Lisp 的实现实现与 Java 的互操作。该工作揭示在 JVM 上混合 Lisp 方言的挑战与可能性，为语言实验和跨语言开发提供了有趣的路径。

items.title_en: 3D-Printed electric motor via multi-modal, multi-material extrusion
items.title_zh: 通过多模态多材料挤出技术实现的 3D 打印电动机
items.summary_en: A report on a 3D-printed electric motor produced with multi-modal, multi-material extrusion, illustrating the potential for integrated, lightweight motor components. It discusses trade-offs in performance, thermal management, and manufacturability of such custom parts.
items.summary_zh: 报道展示了通过多模态、多材料挤出技术实现的 3D 打印电动机，体现了一体化、轻量化部件的潜力。文章评估了性能、热管理与可制造性等权衡。

items.title_en: 30 Years of Decompilation and the Unsolved Structuring Problem: Part 1 (2024)
items.title_zh: 三十年的反编译与未解决的结构化问题：第一部分（2024）
items.summary_en: A retrospective on decompilation history, focusing on the ongoing challenge of recovering high-level structure from binaries. It discusses why structural organization remains hard and how tooling is evolving to bridge the gap.
items.summary_zh: 回顾性论文聚焦反编译史中的长期难题：如何从二进制中还原高级结构。讨论为何结构化组织仍然困难，以及工具如何演进以缩小这一差距。

items.title_en: Read Locks Are Not Your Friends
items.title_zh: 读锁不是你的朋友
items.summary_en: The post argues that read locks can hinder concurrency and lead to performance issues in distributed systems; it suggests alternative synchronization patterns like lock-free data structures or optimistic concurrency.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为读锁可能阻碍并发、导致分布式系统的性能问题；建议采用无锁数据结构或乐观并发等替代同步模式。

items.title_en: Running RISC-V in a VM to test my snaps
items.title_zh: 在虚拟机中运行 RISC-V 来测试我的 Snap 包
items.summary_en: A blog post describes running a RISC-V VM to test Snap packages, enabling cross-arch validation without physical hardware. It highlights practical steps and benefits for developers packaging software for multiple architectures.
items.summary_zh: 博客描述了在虚拟机中运行 RISC-V 以测试 Snap 包，便于在不使用物理硬件的情况下进行跨架构验证。文章给出实际步骤并强调对多体系结构打包的软件开发者的好处。

items.title_en: Confusables.txt and NFKC disagree on 31 characters
items.title_zh: Confusables.txt 与 NFKC 在31个字符上的不一致
items.summary_en: Unicode studies show Confusables.txt mappings clash with NFKC normalization for 31 characters, producing potential security and UX pitfalls in input handling and font rendering.
items.summary_zh: 研究显示 Confusables.txt 的映射与 NFKC 正规化在 31 个字符上存在冲突，可能带来输入处理与字体渲染的安全与用户体验问题。文章给出具体示例，并倡议在依赖 Unicode 清理的应用中谨慎选择正规化策略。
